# EU-112™ — EU AI Act Operational Readiness

> Free software, support, and done-for-you implementation for AI inventory, governance, oversight, evidence and operational readiness.

## Core pages

- Homepage: https://eu-112.eu/
- Start Free: https://eu-112.eu/start-free.html
- Offer: https://eu-112.eu/offer.html
- Guide: https://eu-112.eu/guide.html

## Boundary

Not legal advice. Not certification. Not a notified body.
